cards.back: An iterative and adaptive approach to project management, emphasizing flexibility, collaboration, and continuous improvement
A software development methodology that emphasizes technical practices such as pair programming, continuous integration, and test-driven development to enhance software quality and speed
A framework for iterative and incremental project management, emphasizing roles, ceremonies, and artifacts to facilitate collaboration and deliver working software
A visual system for managing work, emphasizing continuous flow, limit setting, and continuous improvement to optimize delivery and reduce waste
Tools such as Jira, Trello, Asana, and Microsoft Teams, which provide features like task management, sprint planning, and team collaboration to support agile project delivery
